title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Abbott India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Abbott India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Abbott India:
Abbott India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India!
